summary: Hydrated preflight shows the original representative #39463 is closed and security-sensitive, #40850 is also security-sensitive, and the remaining open PRs are distinct install.sh subfamilies rather than one mergeable canonical path. No GitHub mutations are safe from this pass; security refs are routed, closed refs are skipped, and open refs are kept for separate repair/review paths.
